<a href=\"admin.php?page=design\">Kursde: Diseño del curso: crea las páginas que necesitas para cursos, categorías, ubicaciones e instructores a través de "WordPress pages". Los shortcodes se insertan automáticamente.
<em>Skjul kategorien og alle tilhørende: Ocultar la categoría y todos los cursos relacionados: tanto la categoría como todos los cursos etiquetados con la categoría están completamente ocultos de la lista de cursos. Útil para categorías internas que no deberían ser visibles para los visitantes.
<em>Skjul kun kategorien fra filter</em>: Ocultar solo la categoría del filtro: la categoría está oculta de las opciones de filtro, pero los cursos etiquetados con la categoría siguen apareciendo en la lista de cursos bajo sus otras categorías. Útil para etiquetas "amplias" que no tienen sentido como filtros (por ejemplo, "Conferencias", "HMS y cursos de seguridad").
<em>Vis</em> – kategorien vises i filter: Mostrar: la categoría aparece en el filtro y los cursos aparecen en la lista (predeterminado).
<p><strong>Bruk Kursagenten instruktørpr:
En su

lugar, utiliza el perfil del instructor Kursagenten:

  1. Eliminar este instructor
  2. Guarda un curso en Kursagenten donde se añada el instructor
<p><strong>Gå tilbake til Kursagenten-da:
Volver a Kursagenten datos:

  1. Desactivar el botón "Anular perfil de Kursagenten"
  2. Actualiza el perfil del instructor en Kursagenten
  3. El perfil se actualiza aquí. Nota: el instructor debe estar vinculado a un curso para que se obtengan los datos.

- Si utilizas datos de Kursagenten, no es necesario que los mantengas actualizados en dos lugares.
- Un instructor creado en Kursagenten con el mismo nombre se fusionará automáticamente con este instructor.
<strong>Advarsel:</strong> Navn og slug: Advertencia: El nombre y el slug para las ubicaciones de los cursos no se pueden cambiar aquí. Puede cambiar el nombre en Sincronización.
<strong>Alternativt bilde:</strong> Et e: Imagen alternativa: una imagen adicional que se puede usar en la página del instructor.
<strong>Antall per side:</strong> Velg a: Número por página: elija cuántos cursos mostrar por página.
<strong>Automatisk opprettelse:</strong>: Creación automática: ve a las páginas de Diseño del curso → WordPress y haz clic en "Crear página" para cada página que necesites. El shortcode se inserta automáticamente.
<strong>Automatisk opprydding:</strong>: Limpieza automática: una limpieza nocturna automática también se realiza a las 03:00 todas las noches, por lo que la limpieza manual no siempre es necesaria. Utilice la limpieza manual si tiene muchas fechas de cursos vencidos que aparecen en el sitio web y desea limpiar de inmediato.
<strong>Automatisk synkronisering via we: Sincronización automática a través de webhooks: cuando se configuran los webhooks, los cursos se actualizan automáticamente cuando cambian en Kursagenten. Este es el método recomendado para las actualizaciones continuas.
<strong>Automatisk:</strong> Steder blir: Automático: las ubicaciones se asignan automáticamente a las regiones en función del condado cuando las regiones están habilitadas.
<strong>Avkrysning før synkronisering:</: Casilla de verificación antes de la sincronización: al hacer clic en "Obtener todos los cursos de Kursagenten", puedes marcar "Limpiar los cursos después de la sincronización". Esto ejecuta la limpieza automáticamente después de que se complete la sincronización. Nota: La limpieza tarda de 3 a 5 minutos adicionales.
<strong>Bilde:</strong> Et bilde som vis: Imagen: una imagen que se muestra en la página de ubicación y en las listas.
<strong>Bilde:</strong> Last opp et hove: Image: Upload a main image displayed on the taxonomy page and in lists.
<strong>Bilder:</strong> Bruk plassholde: Images: Use placeholder images via shortcodes if you are missing images.
<strong>Bredde:</strong> Velg om du vil: Width: Choose whether to use the theme's default width or full width. In most cases, default width works as intended.
<strong>Bruk i kortkoder:</strong> Du ka: Use in shortcodes: You can filter course locations by region in the [kurssteder] shortcode:
<strong>Bygg ditt eget design</strong> e: Build your own design is active. You can still control course data display below.
Build your own design is active. Kursagenten uses the WordPress template hierarchy so your theme/page builder can control the layout.
<strong>Byggeblokker kommer:</strong> vi: Blocks coming soon: we are planning modules for course lists with course locations/links and information about upcoming courses.
<strong>Cache:</strong> Tøm cache hvis d: Cache: Clear cache if you do not see changes immediately.
<strong>Designendringer:</strong> Hvis d: Design changes: If design changes do not appear, you may need to clear cache and update permalinks.
<strong>Egen opprydding:</strong> Du kan: Separate cleanup: You can also run cleanup separately by clicking the "Clean up courses" button on the Synchronization page. This is useful if you only want to clean up without re-synchronizing all courses.
<strong>Eget innhold over/under:</strong: Custom content above/below: You can add regular content in the editor above and below the shortcode to write an introduction, add images or other information.
<strong>Ekstra felter:</strong> Spesifik: Extra fields: Specific fields depending on the taxonomy type (see below).
<strong>Enkel - kun tittel og kort beskr: Simple – title and short description only: Title and short description, then course list. Suitable when you do not have images or extended description.
<strong>Enkle kort:</strong> Hvite kort: Simple cards: White cards with heading and text. Shows the next available date for courses. You can choose the number of columns for desktop, tablet and mobile.
<strong>Felles designmal:</strong> Alle: Shared design template: All taxonomies use the same design template.
<strong>Grid:</strong> Et rutenett med k: Grid: A grid of course cards in multiple columns. You can choose the number of columns for desktop, tablet and mobile.
<strong>Hovedbilde:</strong> Et bilde so: Main image: An image displayed on the category page and in lists.
<strong>Hva er kortkoder?</strong> Kortk: What are shortcodes? Shortcodes are small codes you place in content (pages/posts) to display dynamic lists and components from the plugin.
<strong>Hvor brukes de?</strong> Vanligv: Where are they used? Usually on dedicated pages or posts (e.g. "Courses", "Course categories", "Course locations", "Instructors"). You can also use them in menus or widgets.
<strong>Ikon:</strong> Et alternativt bi: Icon: An alternative image that can be used instead of the main image in lists. PNG icons work well here (use kilde=ikon in the shortcode).
<strong>Instruktører</strong> – Innehold: Instructors – Contains [instruktorer] to display all instructors.
<strong>Kompakt:</strong> En mer kompakt: Compact: A more compact list view with less spacing. No background, and fewer course elements.
<strong>Kort beskrivelse:</strong> En ko: Short description: A short text that can be displayed in lists and overviews. Often shown directly below the heading.
Short description: A short text that can be displayed in lists.
Short description: A short text that can be displayed in lists. Often shown directly below the heading.
<strong>Kurs</strong> – Inneholder <code: Courses – Contains [kursliste] to display all courses with filters.
<strong>Kurskategorier</strong> – Inneho: Course categories – Contains [kurskategorier] to display all categories.
<strong>Kursliste (kun for kurskategorie: Course list (course categories only): Three options control how the category affects the course list:
<strong>Kursliste med filter </strong><s:
Course list with filter [kursliste]

<strong>Kurssteder opprettes automatisk<: Course locations are created automatically when you synchronize courses from Kursagenten. You cannot add course locations manually here.
<strong>Kurssteder</strong> – Inneholder: Course locations – Contains [kurssteder] to display all course locations.
<strong>Layout og struktur:</strong> Hvo: Layout and structure: Where elements are placed on the page (header, content, sidebar, footer).
<strong>Layout:</strong> Velg designet p: Layout: Choose the page design. This controls where/how title, text, main image and course list are displayed.
<strong>Layout</strong> bestemmer oppset:
Layout determines the arrangement of elements on the page (header, columns, hooks).
List design determines how courses are displayed in the list (default, grid, plain, compact, date and title).
Display type determines whether to show main courses or all course dates.

<strong>Listedesign:</strong> Velg desig: List design: Choose the course list design (default, grid, compact, simple cards...)
<strong>Listedesign:</strong> Velg liste: List design: Choose list design (default, grid, compact, simple list, simple cards).
<strong>Listedesign</strong> bestemmer h: List design determines how courses are displayed in the list (default, grid, plain, compact, date and title).
<strong>Manuell synkronisering:</strong>: Manual synchronization: Go to Synchronization and click "Fetch all courses from Kursagenten". This should be done the first time you set up the plugin, and when you need to update all courses at once.
<strong>Manuelt:</strong> Du kan endre r: Manual: You can change the region for individual locations by editing the course location in the Course locations overview.
<strong>Merk:</strong> Regioner må være: Note: Regions must be enabled for filtering to work. You can also change the region for individual course locations by editing the location in the Course locations overview.
<strong>Navn:</strong> Instruktørens nav: Name: The instructor's name (can be split into first and last name).
<strong>Navn:</strong> Kategorinavnet (k: Name: The category name (comes from Kursagenten, should not be changed).
<strong>Navn:</strong> Stedsnavnet (komm: Name: The location name (comes from Kursagenten, but can be changed via the name change feature).
<strong>Navnendring på kurssteder:</stro:
Name change for course locations:
You can change course location names under Synchronization → Course location name changes. When you change a location name, slugs (URLs) for courses with this location are also updated.
The old location is not deleted, but is no longer visible on the website.
<strong>Når bør du bruke kortkoder?</str: When should you use shortcodes? If you build pages with Elementor or other page builders, shortcodes will likely be what you need to use.
<strong>Obs:</strong> For at brukerne sk: Note: For users to be able to turn the filter on and off, you must drag "Available courses" into "Filters in left column" or "Filters above course list" under Filter settings.
<strong>OBS!</strong> Fyll inn <a href=\: NOTE! Enter settings from Kursagenten before fetching all your courses (sync all courses).
<strong>Overstyr profil fra Kursagenten:: Override profile from Kursagenten: Enable this to edit name, email and phone. When enabled, these fields will not be updated automatically from Kursagenten during synchronization.
<strong>Overstyr profilbilde:</strong> A: Override profile image: Enable this to use your own uploaded image instead of the image from Kursagenten.
<strong>Page builder (Kadence Elements,: Page builder (Kadence Elements, Elementor, etc.): If you want to control single/archive/taxonomy with page builder conditions, go to Course design → Single course and enable Use WordPress default template hierarchy. The plugin then lets the theme/page builder choose the template without forcing the plugin's own layout files.
<strong>Permalenker:</strong> Ved endrin: Permalinks: When changing URL settings, save "Permalinks" again.
<strong>Plassering:</strong> Filtrene ve: Placement: Choose filters by dragging them to the correct position. You can show them to the left of the course list and/or above the course list.
<strong>Profil - rundt bilde og tittel:<: Profile – around image and title: Around the image, then title and description, then course list.
<strong>Profilbilde:</strong> Et hovedbi: Profile image: A main image displayed on the instructor page and in lists. This can be from Kursagenten or your own uploaded image.
<strong>Region:</strong> (Hvis regioner: Region: (If regions are enabled) Choose which region the location belongs to.
<strong>Regioner:</strong><br>Du kan akt:
Regions:
You can enable and manage regions under Synchronization → Regions.
<strong>Regioner:</strong><br>Regioner e:
Regions:
Regions are enabled. You can manage regional division under Synchronization → Regions. Regional assignment can be changed for each course location.
<strong>Rekkefølge på elementer:</strong: Element order: The order in which information is displayed (intro text, main content, course dates, instructors, etc.).
<strong>Rekkefølge:</strong> Du kan også: Order: You can also drag filters to change the order they are displayed in.
<strong>Ren og enkel liste:</strong> Bas: Clean and simple list: Based on Standard list, but without background and with fewer course elements.
<strong>Separate designmaler:</strong> A: Separate design templates: Enable this to choose different design templates for categories, locations and instructors.
<strong>Skjul i automenyer:</strong> Når: Hide in auto menus: When enabled, the category is hidden in auto-generated menus that use the [ka-meny] shortcode. Useful if you have categories that should not appear in the main menu.
<strong>Skjul i oversiktslister:</strong: Hide in overview lists: When enabled, the category is hidden in shortcodes such as [kurskategorier] and similar lists. The category will still be accessible directly via URL.
<strong>Slug:</strong> URL-vennlig versj: Slug: URL-friendly version of the name (should not be changed as it may break links).
Slug: URL-friendly version of the name (updated automatically when the name changes).
<strong>Standard - med bilde og beskrive: Default – with image and description: Title and description, then image and description, then course list.
<strong>Standard:</strong> En tradisjone: Default: A traditional list view with course cards, one course per row/box.
<strong>Synkronisering:</strong> Hvis ku: Synchronization: If courses are not updated automatically, check that webhooks are configured correctly in Kursagenten.
<strong>Tagger eller lister:</strong> Fi: Tags or lists: Filters can be shown as tags or checkboxes. Tags are buttons that select one filter at a time; checkboxes allow selecting multiple filters at once.
<strong>Test:</strong> Besøk frontend og: Test: Visit the frontend and verify it looks as expected.
<strong>Utvidet beskrivelse:</strong> En: Extended description: A longer text with HTML formatting displayed on the instructor page.
Extended description: A longer text with HTML formatting displayed on the category page.
Extended description: A longer text with HTML formatting displayed on the location page.

Extended description: A longer text with rich text formatting (HTML) displayed on the taxonomy page. Here you can describe the category, location or instructor with text, images and other information.
<strong>Velge eksisterende side:</strong: Select existing page: You can also select an existing WordPress page from the dropdown and assign it to a function. Paste the shortcode manually. You can copy the code from the icon next to the name.
<strong>Viktig:</strong> Endringer i des: Important: Changes to the design template may require cache refresh and permalink updates, especially for extensive URL customizations.
<strong>Viktig:</strong> Navnet på kurss: Important: The course location name in WordPress admin is read-only when it comes from Kursagenten. To change the name shown on the website, use the name change feature instead of editing the taxonomy directly.
<strong>Viktig:</strong> Når du overskri: Important: When you override fields, they will no longer be updated automatically from Kursagenten. You must update them manually if there are changes in Kursagenten.
<strong>Vis bilder:</strong> Skru av/på: Show images: Turn images in the list on/off. Best suited if you have uploaded images for courses in Kursagenten.
<strong>Vis:</strong> Kategorien vises i:
Show: The category appears in the filter, and courses tagged with the category appear in the course list.
Hide only the category from filter: The category is hidden from the filter, but courses tagged with this category still appear in the course list (under their other categories).
Hide the category and all related courses: Neither the category nor courses tagged with it appear in the course list – useful for internal categories.
<strong>Visning av liste:</strong> I ven: List display: In the left column, lists are shown as checkboxes; above the course list, lists are shown as dropdown menus.
<strong>Visningstype:</strong> Velg om d: Display type: Choose whether to show main courses (one course per row/box) or all course dates (equivalent to "Course list with filter").
<strong>Visningstype</strong> bestemmer: Display type determines whether to show main courses or all course dates.
<strong>Visuelle detaljer:</strong> Styl: Visual details: Styling, spacing and other visual design.
Aktiver dette hvis du bruker andre SEO-u: Enable this if you use other SEO plugins that are not listed below, or want to handle SEO entirely on your own.
Aktiver regioninndeling (Sørlandet, Østl: Enable regional division (Sørlandet, Østlandet, Vestlandet, Midt-Norge, Nord-Norge)
Alle systemsider følger WordPress sin st: All system pages follow WordPress's standard template hierarchy, so if your theme has its own templates (e.g. single-ka_course.php or taxonomy-ka_coursecategory.php), those are used instead of the plugin's default template.
Alle taksonomisider (kategorier, kursste: All taxonomy pages (categories, course locations and instructors) can be enriched with extra content such as images, text and descriptions. This lets you customize each page with unique content beyond what comes from Kursagenten.
Alle tilgjengelige kurssteder og datoer: All available course locations and dates
Automatisk bruker responsivt srcset når: Automatic uses responsive srcset when possible for sharper images.
Automenyer brukes når du vil at menyen a: Auto menus are used when you want the menu to automatically show taxonomies and/or courses without manually updating menu items when something changes.
Automenyer i WordPress-menyen: Auto menus in the WordPress menu
Avstand rundt alle elementene, første ve: Spacing around all elements; the first value is top and bottom, the second is left and right.
Begge feltene må fylles ut: Both fields must be filled in
Begrense innholdet med <strong>stedsfilt: Limit content with location filter (e.g. only "Oslo" or "not Oslo").
Begrenser til termer med kurs på angitt: Limits to terms with courses at the specified location. Start with "not-" to exclude. Leave empty for all.
Behold H3 som standard med mindre du har: Keep H3 as default unless you have a clear semantic reason to change it.
Bilde hentes fra instruktørprofil i Kurs: Images are fetched from the instructor profile in Kursagenten. This image can be overridden on the website. You can also use an alternative image if you want a different style or image than the one used in Kursagenten.
Bruk \"Resett til standard\" for å tilba: Use "Reset to default" to restore the regional division to default values.
Bruk ekstern lenke på kurstittel: Use external link on course title
Bruk ekstern lenke på påmeldingsknapp: Use external link on registration button
Bruk kursbilde, og <a href=\"/wp-admin/a: Use course image, and placeholder image for course if course image is missing
Bruk kursbilde, og bakgrunnsfarge om kur: Use course image, and background color if course image is missing
Bruk parameterne <code>type</code>, <cod: Use the type, start and optionally st parameters to control which categories/locations or instructors are displayed.
Bruk standardvalg for valgt listedesign: Use default selection for selected list design
Bruk taksonomibilde, og <a href=\"/wp-ad: Use taxonomy image, and general placeholder image if image is missing
Bruk taksonomibilde, og bakgrunnsfarge o: Use taxonomy image, and background color if image is missing
Brukes for å fremheve enkelte bokser i \: Used to highlight certain boxes in the "Boxes" design. If only "Background for highlighted areas" is set, both get the same color.
Brukes når Skygge/kantstil = Ingen, men: Used when Shadow/border style = None, but use border.
Byggeblokker for enkeltkurs kommer i en: Blocks for single courses will come in a later update. For now, you can build content with your theme/page builder and existing hooks/shortcodes.
Cloudflare blokkerer nedlastingen med bo: Cloudflare is blocking the download with bot verification. URL: %s. Solution: Go to Cloudflare Dashboard > Security > WAF > Custom Rules and add a rule that allows /kursagenten-api/download_plugin, or disable Bot Fight Mode for this URL.
Denne siden hjelper deg raskt i gang med: This page helps you get started quickly with setting up the Kursagenten plugin from A to Z. Follow the steps in order, and use the left menu to jump between sections.
Denne visningen bruker den enklere liste: This view uses the simpler list with the next available date and does not have the same filter options as "Show all course dates".
Design: Lister og grid <span class=\"sma: List and grid design more info
Designet på listene kan endres med attri: List design can be changed with attributes in the shortcode. See the overview for available options.
Designmalene viser frem innholdet på for: Design templates present content in different ways.
Det er for øyeblikket ingen instruktører: There are currently no instructors to display.
Det er for øyeblikket ingen kurssteder å: There are currently no course locations to display.
Det er for øyeblikket ingen relaterte ku: There are currently no related courses to display.
Det er foreløpig ikke mange designmaler: There are not many design templates available for single courses yet. We plan to add more design templates soon.
No date has been set for new courses. Register your interest for more information or to join the waiting list.
Det er mulig å legge inn plassholderbild: You can add placeholder images under Admin → Kursagenten → Course design.
Det finnes to måter å rydde opp på:: There are two ways to clean up:
Det gamle stedet blir ikke slettet, men: The old location is not deleted, but it will no longer be visible on the website.
Det meste av data skal styres fra Kursag: Most data should be managed from Kursagenten. For a few parts we do not have fields, and for those you can enrich category/location/instructor directly on the website via Admin → Kursagenten → Course locations/Instructors/Course locations.
Det opprettes også automatisk en side fo: A payment page is also created automatically when the plugin is activated. This page contains code that generates the payment box and is required for payment functionality to work. The payment page is published automatically, while the other overview pages are created as drafts so you can edit them before publishing.
Dette bildet brukes som hovedbilde på in: This image is used as the main image on the instructor profile.
Dette bildet kan brukes som et alternati: This image can be used as an alternative image on the instructor profile.
Dette er den største fontstørrelsen du v: This is the largest font size you will use for text and headings.
Dette feltet er overskrevet fra Kursagen: This field is overridden from Kursagenten
Dette feltet viser om bildet er automati: This field shows whether the image was automatically fetched from Kursagenten.
Dette legger inn rating i Course schema: This adds rating to the Course schema on course pages. It also adds a redirect based on query strings in emails from Kursagenten to the rating form on the correct course page.
Dette valget deaktiverer Gravatar på fro: This option disables Gravatar on the frontend and uses a local default image instead. This can resolve issues with tracking prevention in some browsers.
Dette valget legger til:<br>1) Clickjack:
This option adds:
1) Clickjacking Protection (X-Frame-Options) in WordPress, strengthens security headers.
2) Disables theme and plugin editing
3) Removes WP version number
4) Disables XML-RPC in WordPress
Disse innstillingene fungerer som standa: These settings work as defaults for shortcodes. You can also override them directly in the shortcode with attributes. See Shortcodes for lists and grid for more information.
Disse innstillingene kan settes både ved: These settings can be set when editing the category, via quick edit, and via bulk edit ("Kursagenten: Bulk edit visibility") in the overview.
Disse slugene bruker fallback med prefix: These slugs use fallback with prefix.
Dra automenyen til riktig plassering i m: Drag the auto menu to the correct position in the menu structure. As a main menu item it can be at the top level, or you can drag it under an existing page (e.g. "Courses") to use it as a submenu.
Dra fylker mellom regionene for å organi: Drag counties between regions to organize them according to your needs.
Dra fylker mellom regioner for å organis: Drag counties between regions to organize them. Note that some counties are outdated but are included for backward compatibility. Use "Reset to default" to reset the regional division to default values.
Dra menypunktet dit menyen skal vises, f: Drag the menu item to where the menu should appear, for example as a submenu under the "Courses" page.
Du finner innstillingene for <strong><a:
You can find the settings for Provider ID and Provider GUID in Kursagenten under Company information -> Settings, and Theme for course lists under Embedded / iframe

In Integration settings, under the Webhooks tab, enter %s in the CourseCreated and CourseUpdated fields to automatically update courses when they are created or changed in Kursagenten.
Du har ikke tilgang til denne funksjonen: You do not have access to this function.
Du har ikke tillatelse til å åpne denne: You do not have permission to open this page.
Du kan bruke blokkene i stedet for kortk: You can use blocks instead of shortcodes if you build pages with Gutenberg. The same options described under Shortcodes for lists and grid are largely available directly in block settings.
Du kan endre navn på kurssteder som komm: You can change the name of course locations that come from Kursagenten. This is useful if you want shorter or more descriptive names on the website.
You can change the name of course locations that come from Kursagenten. This is done via Synchronization → Course location name changes. See Location names and regions for more information.
Du kan fritt endre tittel, slug og innho: You can freely change title, slug and content on the pages. The only thing that should not be removed is the shortcode.
Du kan kontrollere hvor kategoriene vise: You can control where categories appear with several visibility settings:
Du kan laste opp bilder for hver kategor: You can upload images for each category. You can also upload a "profile image". This can be used in blocks/shortcodes as an alternative to the main image. If no category image has been uploaded, it will try to use an image from a linked course. If none is found, a placeholder image will be used.
Du kan legge inn menypunkter som automat: You can add menu items that automatically generate course categories, course locations and instructors. More information in the Menus section.

Her finner du innstillinger for synkroni:
Here you will find settings for synchronizing courses from Kursagenten.
- By clicking "Get all courses from Kursagenten" you transfer all your courses. Note that synchronization is one-way only.
- We recommend syncing courses automatically. Add Webhooks in Kursagenten so the course is transferred when it is saved/created. See URL below.
- You can also clean up courses if there are outdated dates or similar.
Her kan du endre navn på kurssteder som:
Here you can change names for course locations that come from Kursagenten. When you change the name of a location, the slugs (URLs) of courses at that location are also updated.

1. The new location is saved when you click "Save".
2. The location is "translated" to the new name when courses are fetched from Kursagenten.
3. Slugs/URLs for courses at this location are updated immediately.
4. The old location is not deleted, but is no longer visible on the website.

5. Important: To apply the name changes, run a full sync from Kursagenten by clicking "Get all courses from Kursagenten". Also remember to check "Clean up courses" before running the sync.
Her kan du legge til egendefinert CSS so: Here you can add custom CSS that will be loaded on all pages belonging to the plugin. This CSS has the highest priority and will override the plugin's default CSS.
Her kan du skrive inn informasjon som vi: Enter information that will be used in various places on the website. This includes the main contact name (privacy policy), as well as company name and address (contact page and footer).

Enter information that will be used in various places on the website. This includes the main contact name (privacy policy), as well as company name and address (contact page and footer).
You can also add information about the company that can be displayed with a shortcode. See all shortcodes here.

Hver kategori, hvert sted og hver instru: Each category, location and instructor automatically gets its own page. These are generated from templates chosen in Course design. You can enrich these pages with extra content, images and text by editing the taxonomies.
Hvert kurs har sin egen side som generer: Each course has its own page generated automatically based on the selected design template. Content is fetched from Kursagenten, including the image. You can add custom content between intro text and main content by editing the course. You will see a marker for this area when you visit the page as an administrator, plus a link to edit. There is also a shortcut to edit the course in Kursagenten. Look for a pencil icon you can click. This opens the course in Kursagenten in a new tab. Make your changes there, save, and you will see the changes on the website immediately.
Hvis du oppretter sider for kurs, kurska:
If you create pages for courses, course categories, course locations and/or instructors, the pages are created as regular WordPress pages. You can freely change the title and content. A shortcode is inserted automatically.
Blocks: The taxonomies Course categories, Course locations and Instructors are available as separate Gutenberg blocks in the block editor. You can choose to use the blocks instead of shortcodes if you build the pages with Gutenberg.
Hvis regioner er aktivert, kan du tilord: If regions are enabled, you can assign each course location to a region (Sørlandet, Østlandet, Vestlandet, Midt-Norge, Nord-Norge). This can be done in two ways:
Hvordan fallback fungerer: Når \"Skjul i: How fallback works: When "Hide in URLs" is enabled, we first try a short URL without prefix. If the slug conflicts with a page/post or another hidden taxonomy, a prefix URL is used automatically (e.g. /kurskategori/slug/ or your custom value such as /kat/slug/). Regular WordPress pages and posts always take priority in case of conflict.

Pages are marked with "Kursagenten" in the page overview. By clicking you copy the shortcode to the clipboard and can paste it where you want to display it on an existing page.

Sikre deg plass på dette kurset nå. Har: Secure your place on this course now. If you have questions, do not hesitate to contact us.
Siste frist for å melde deg på dette kur: Last deadline to register for this course.
Sjekk <a href=\"admin.php?page=seo\">End: Check Change URLs if you need to customize URL structures. Here you can change e.g. from "/kurs/your-course" to "/undervisning/your-course".
Skjul alle filtre, kursteller, \"vis ant: Hide all filters, course counter, "show number of courses" and sorting
Skjul instruktør ved å skrive en kommase: Hide instructor by writing a comma-separated list of instructor first names as entered in the "first name" field
Skjul kategorien og alle tilhørende kurs: Hide the category and all related courses
Skjul kun kategorien fra filter: Hide only the category from filter
Skjul kun kategorien fra filter (kursene: Hide only the category from filter (courses still shown)
Skjul spesifikke lokasjoner på kursstede: Hide specific locations on course locations
Skjul stedsfilter i videre visning: Hide location filter in further views
Skjuler du prefix i url-er, kan det opps: If you hide the prefix in URLs, conflicts may occur with regular pages, posts or other taxonomies with the same slug. See information about the fallback mechanism below.
Skriv inn avstanden mellom radene, i pix: Enter the spacing between rows in pixels, em or rem. For no spacing, enter 0.
Skriv inn størrelse på bildet du ønsker,: Enter the image size you want in pixels. For no image, enter 0. When bildestr is set to 0, images are not loaded at all.
Skriver du kun kortkodene <span class=\":
If you only use the shortcodes [kurskategorier], [kurssteder] or [instruktorer], the default values are used.
Alternatively, use the full codes above and remove the options you do not need.
Skru av SEO på kurs og taksonomisider: Turn off SEO for courses and taxonomy pages
Skru på de innstillingene du ønsker å br: Enable the settings you want to use:
Skygge ved musepeker over kurs/kurskateg: Shadow on hover for course/course category.
Slugs (nettadresser) på kursene som har: Slugs (URLs) for courses with this location are updated on the next synchronization.
Spesifikke lokasjoner viser adresser og: Specific locations show addresses and links to Google maps above the course list.
Standarbilder brukes som en bakupløsning: Default images are used as a fallback to prevent broken designs. These are used as placeholders when an image is missing. If you choose no images, we use Kursagenten's default replacement images if necessary. You can also set placeholder image URLs via shortcodes.
Standard (toppfilter + venstrefilter sli: Default (top filter + left filter as configured)
standard, grid, compact, plain, date-and:
standard, grid, compact, plain, date-and-title, simple-cards
Default: fetched from Course design
standard, kommaseparert liste (feks alta:
standard, comma-separated list (e.g. alta,oslo,bergen or "Oslo,Mo i Rana")
Default: shows all locations
Start direkte med visuelle stilvalg: Start directly with visual style choices
Stedsbeskrivelser fra feltet 'Sted' i Ku: Location descriptions from the 'Location' field in Kursagenten.
Stedsnavn hentes fra Kursagenten. Det er: Location names are fetched from Kursagenten. You can change the location name. For this to be correct in all titles and URLs, do this under Admin → Kursagenten → Synchronization. Change the name, then re-fetch all courses. All occurrences of the location name will then display correctly.
Stedstekst: her har vi ingen felter i Ku: Location text: we have no fields for this in Kursagenten, and everything must be added on the website. You can add both Short description and Long description. These appear on the individual course location pages on the website.
Søkefeltet får pill-form, tydelig kant o: The search field gets a pill shape, clear border and magnifying glass on the right. Only applies when search is in the left column.
sørlandet, østlandet, vestlandet, midt-n:
sørlandet, østlandet, vestlandet, midt-norge, nord-norge
Default: no filtering
Ta kontakt med oss, så hjelper vi deg me: Contact us and we will help you find the perfect course for your needs.
Ta tak i filteret du ønsker å bruke, og:
Grab the filter you want to use and drag it to either the left column or above the course list. Choose whether the filter should be displayed as tags or a checklist.
To remove a filter, drag it back to available filters. Remember to save your changes.
Taksonomiene <strong>Kurskategorier</str: The taxonomies Course categories, Course locations and Instructors are available as separate Gutenberg blocks in the block editor.
Tekst blir hentet fra introtekst og kurs: Text is fetched from the intro text and course description in Kursagenten. You can add your own text on the website as well. Navigate to the course while logged in as admin, then click "Add extra WordPress content" between the intro text and course description.
Teksten justerer seg etter skjermstørrel: Text adjusts to screen size. This is the smallest font size you will use for text and headings.
Test frontend: kursliste, enkeltkurs, ka: Test frontend: course list, single course, categories, course locations and instructors, and adjust filters/design as needed.
tid, varighet, pris, sted, fritekst-sted:
time, duration, price, location, free-text location, room, instructor, end date, registration deadline
Default: fetched from Course design
Tilpass grunnleggende designvariabler so: Customize basic design variables such as colors, font sizes, and max width on plugin pages.
Tilpass visningen av kurslisten. Denne v: Customize the course list display. This is shown on the system page "Courses" and everywhere else that uses the shortcode [kursliste].
Tips: Hvis du har mange kurskategorier,: Tip: If you have many course categories, you can select some as main categories or create your own. This makes the categories more manageable for visitors.
Ulike layout. Stablet viser bilde over k: Different layouts. Stacked shows image above course/category name; row shows image to the left. List shows all names stacked vertically. List has less spacing between items and works better with small images or no images.
Under <a href=\"admin.php?page=design\">: Under Course design you control list design on system pages. There are settings for image use, number of columns and pagination.
Under <a href=\"admin.php?page=design#se: Under Course design → WordPress pages you can create the following pages:
Under overskrift, over filter/paginering: Below heading, above filter/pagination and list.
Unntak: Du kan legge til ekstra innhold: Exception: You can add extra content between "Intro text" and "Content" on single courses if you want to enrich courses with site-specific information.
Ved å bytte designmal endres hele presen: Changing the design template changes the entire presentation of the course. This can affect how visitors experience the course information.
Velg \"Fullt navn\", \"Fornavn\" eller \: Choose "Full name", "First name" or "Last name" in the "Name display" field.
Velg design på sider som viser kursdetal: Select design for pages showing course details, both for all locations and single locations.
Velg designet på siden. Dette styrer hvo: Choose the page design. This controls where/how title, text, main image and course list are displayed.
Velg en forelder for å lage et hierarki,: Choose a parent to create a hierarchy and make this a subcategory.
Velg et felles design for kurskategorier: Choose a shared design for course categories, course locations and instructors. You can also choose to have separate designs for each taxonomy.
Velg filtre på kursliste i <a href=\"adm: Choose filters on the course list in Course design, and other design choices (list/grid, details, and template selection).
Velg helt firkantede bilder, litt avrund: Choose fully square images, slightly rounded corners, or round images.
Velg hvilke filtre som skal vises på kur: Choose which filters to display on the course list. You can drag the filter to either the left column or above the course list. Choose whether the filter should be displayed as tags or a checklist.
Velg hvilken overskrift du vil bruke for: Choose which heading to use for names.
Velg hvilken region denne lokasjonen til: Choose which region this location belongs to.
Velg hvordan kurslistene på taksonomisid: Choose how course lists on taxonomy pages are displayed:
Velg listedesign for kortkoden <span cla: Choose list design for the [kursliste] shortcode without changing the global setting in Course design.
Velg minst én rad før du bruker massered: Select at least one row before using bulk edit.
Velg om denne skal vises i autogenererte: Choose whether this should appear in auto-generated menus.
Velg om denne skal vises i kategoriliste: Choose whether this should appear in category lists and overviews.
Velg om denne skal vises i kursagentens: Choose whether this should appear in Kursagenten's own overviews.
Velg om kurslisten skal vise vanlig knap: Choose whether the course list should show standard button style or registration link style only.
Velg region for filtrering. Kan kombiner: Select region for filtering. Can be combined with location selection ('x or y' logic).
Velg sider som tilegnes til ulike deler: Select pages assigned to different parts of Kursagenten. You can choose from existing pages or create new pages.
Velg standard antall kurs som skal vises: Select default number of courses to display per page (1-50)
Velg stedet fra listen eller skriv inn n: Select the location from the list or enter the name manually, and specify the new name.
Velg ønsket automeny (f.eks. <strong>Kur: Choose the desired auto menu (e.g. Course categories, Categories and courses, Course locations or Instructors) and click Add to menu.
Velg å vise fornavn, etternavn eller beg: Choose to show first name, last name or both.
Velg å vise/skjule kurskategorier/menypu: Choose to show/hide course categories/menu items belonging to specific locations. Example: show all courses that are not online courses: st="ikke-nettbasert"
Velge om menyen skal vise <strong>hovedk: Choose whether the menu should show top-level categories, subcategories or start in a specific category.
venstre, topp, filter-knapp, skjul<br><s:
left, top, filter button, hide
Default: as filters are set up in Course design
Viktig info om url-er<br>Her kan du endr:
Important info about URLs
Here you can change the URL for courses, instructor, course category and course location. NOTE! Do not change unless you know what you are doing. This can break the site and make these pages unavailable. Remember to save permalink settings after making a change.
Viktig: Kursene skal i hovedsak <strong>: Important: Courses should not be edited on the website in general – all editing should be done in Kursagenten. This ensures the information is up to date and correctly synchronized.
Vis eller skjul kategorier knyttet til v: Show or hide categories linked to the selected location.
Vis filter i boks med bakgrunn: Show filter in box with background
Vis filter med kategorier som også er br: Show filter with categories also used on courses with this category, in addition to subcategories. Useful if you cannot create a parent category with subcategories but still want filtering.
Vis filtrene på toppen av listen: Show filters at the top of the list
Vis hovedkurs (med neste tilgjengelige d: Show main courses (with next available date)
Vis kategorifilter (visningstype Alle ku: Show category filter (display type All course dates)
Vis kontaktperson i enkeltkurs: Show contact person in single course
Vis kun kategorier med kurs på angitt st: Show only categories with courses at the specified location (optional)
Vis kun ledige kurs som standard: Show available courses only by default
Vis kursfilter på kategoriside: Show course filter on category page
Vis kurskategorier med preset-stiler: Show course categories with preset styles
Vis kurskategorier, kurssteder eller ins: Show course categories, course locations, or instructors with preset styles.
Vis kurssteder med preset-stiler: Show course locations with preset styles
Vis link-bokser etter kurslisten:: Show link boxes after course list:
Vis link-bokser til flere kategorier/ste: Show link boxes to more categories/locations/instructors after course list
Vis liste med spesifikke lokasjoner unde: Show list of specific locations under each location name. This comes from the "Free-text location" field in Kursagenten.
Vis også manuelt opprettede instruktører: Also show manually created instructors without published courses.
Vis som kort, med hvit bakgrunn og skygg: Show as card with white background and shadow behind the entire card.
Vis tekst fra feltet \"Kort beskrivelse\: Show text from the "Short description" field.
Vis tekst fra feltet \"Utvidet beskrivel: Show text from the "Extended description" field. Note that this will override the excerpt.
Vise fullt navn, fornavn eller etternavn: Show full name, first name or last name
viser alle steder i Østlandet eller Berg: shows all locations in Østlandet or Bergen (OR logic)
viser kun kurssteder i Østlandet: shows only course locations in Østlandet
Displayed right after H1 in the top section.
Displayed right below the entire header block.
